problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: The key to Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? is Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type — specifically Stem cell differentiation — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
